profile.name: Jesse Keenan (Marine veteran, 2001-2005)
profile.business_type: HVAC company (install, repair, maintenance, some plumbing)

challenge: Getting crushed by big national chains (Parker & Sons, Goettl, Day & Night) on Google — homeowners choose them because they show up first
backstory: Marine veteran who started Semper Fi Heating & Cooling over 10 years ago, named after the Marine Corps motto. Technically excellent but technologically lost — his office staff handles anything with a computer. Knows the big chains are eating his lunch on Google but doesn't understand how or what to do about it. Gets frustrated with jargon. Proud of the veteran-owned angle and the 20% military discount. Has over 8,000 reviews.
r3_wrong_claim: So let's just do Google Ads again, but bigger this time — like $2,000 a month instead of $800. Find a better company to run it. If the big guys are winning on Google, I gotta outspend 'em.
r4_contradiction: Should have mentioned — our Google Business Profile probably hasn't been updated in 2 years. My office people do everything on it but they're mostly filling out our internal scheduling system. I'm not sure what's actually listed there right now.
conversational_behaviors: Gets frustrated with jargon — asks for plain English
Proud of Marine Corps background and 8,000+ reviews
Defers technical/marketing execution to office staff

expected_answer_style.q1_business_identity: Semper Fi Heating and Cooling, Mesa, Arizona. HVAC — install, repair, maintenance, some plumbing too. Residential. Named after the Marine Corps motto, I'm a Marine vet. Been running this over 10 years.
expected_answer_style.q2_primary_challenge: The big national guys — Parker & Sons, Goettl, Day & Night — they're everywhere on Google. Homeowner searches 'AC repair Mesa' and those guys own the whole first page. We've been here over a decade, 8,000-plus reviews, we do better work, but we're getting outspent online. Losing jobs to companies that throw more money at Google than I can.
